title: bidens alba
intro: Bidens alba, also known as white beggarticks, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bidens alba include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in digestion. Bidens alba can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in herbal remedies, such as salves and ointments.
